page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Fast k-mer based tool for multi locus sequence typing (mlst) directly from genome sequencing reads
page_metadata.biotools__summary: stringMLST is a tool for detecting the MLST of an isolate directly from the genome sequencing reads. stringMLST predicts the ST of an isolate in a completely assembly and alignment free manner.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: stringMLST is a tool for detecting the MLST of an isolate directly from the genome sequencing reads. stringMLST predicts the ST of an isolate in a completely assembly and alignment free manner.
